message.content:
import { Map, Swords, Trophy, Target, Shield, Sparkles } from 'lucide-react'
import { Callout } from '@/components/mdx/Callout'
import { Card, CardGrid } from '@/components/mdx/CardGrid'
import { Checklist } from '@/components/mdx/Checklist'
import { FAQ } from '@/components/mdx/FAQ'
import { Steps, Step } from '@/components/mdx/Steps'
import { Section } from '@/components/mdx/Section'

export const metadata = {
  title: "Bizarre Lineage How to Summon Stand: Ultimate Guide & Rarity List 2026",
  description: "Master the art of Bizarre Lineage how to summon stand. Learn about Stand Arrow locations, rarity tiers, and the best summoning strategies in this 2026 guide.",
  category: "Guide",
  image: "https://placehold.co/800x400/1e293b/fff?text=Bizarre+Lineage+Summoning+Guide",
  date: "2026-03-04",
  author: "Bizarre Lineage Wiki Team"
}

<Callout type="info" title="Quick Guide">
- **Bizarre Lineage how to summon stand**: Use a Stand Arrow from your inventory to roll a random Stand, then press **TAB** to manifest it.
- **Acquisition**: Obtain arrows through codes, repeatable quests, overworld meteor spawns, or by raiding with the Yoshikage Kira NPC.
- **Stand Storage**: Always store your current Stand in the settings menu before using a new arrow to avoid permanently losing your progress.
- **Best Stand**: Currently, **Whitesnake** is widely considered the top-tier Mythical Stand for the 2026 meta.
- **Awakening**: Reach level 50 and Stand Conjuration level 100 to unlock powerful ultimate abilities at the Gym.
</Callout>

Entering the world of Morioh Cho in this Roblox RPG is an exhilarating experience for any JoJo fan, but the mechanics can be daunting for newcomers. Understanding **bizarre lineage how to summon stand** is the absolute first step in your journey to becoming a powerful user. Your Stand is more than just a companion; it defines your combat style, provides unique passives, and determines your effectiveness in both PvP and PvE encounters. In this comprehensive guide, we will walk you through the entire process of obtaining Stand Arrows, rolling for the rarest entities, and managing your Stand collection efficiently.

Whether you are looking for a common brawler like Red Hot Chili Pepper or aiming for the reality-bending powers of Made in Heaven, knowing the proper summoning rituals and resource management is vital. We have compiled all the latest data for 2026, including updated drop rates and quest rewards, to ensure you never waste a single arrow. Let's dive into the mechanics of **bizarre lineage how to summon stand** and help you build the ultimate Stand roster.

<Section icon={Map} title="Mastering the Basics: Controls and Summoning Mechanics">

Before you can unleash your Stand's full potential, you must understand the basic interface and control scheme. In Bizarre Lineage, there is a technical difference between "rolling" a Stand (obtaining it) and "summoning" it (calling it out for battle). Once you have successfully rolled a Stand using an arrow, it remains attached to your character until replaced or stored.

To bring your Stand onto the battlefield, you must use the default keybinds. If you find the default layout uncomfortable, you can rebind these keys at any time through the in-game Settings menu.

| Action | Keybind | Description |
| :--- | :--- | :--- |
| **Summon/Retract Stand** | **TAB** | Manifests or hides your Stand |
| **Basic Attack** | **M1** | Standard melee strikes |
| **Critical Attack** | **M2** | Heavy hit with cooldown |
| **Stand Abilities** | **E, R, Z, X, C, V** | Unique moveset activation |
| **Stand Ultimate** | **H** | Requires Awakening to use |
| **Block** | **F** | Reduces incoming damage |
| **Dash** | **Q** | Quick movement for evasion |

<Callout type="tip" title="Summoning Efficiency">
When you first roll a Stand, it will not appear automatically. You must press **TAB** to summon it. If your Stand is retracted, you cannot use its specific [E] through [V] abilities, so keep it manifested during combat.
</Callout>

Summoning is just the beginning. To truly excel, you must invest in the correct statistics. If you are focusing on a Stand-heavy build, prioritize **Destructive Power** (increases physical Stand damage) and **Destructive Energy** (increases special ability damage) in your character stat menu.

</Section>

<Section icon={Target} title="How to Obtain Stand Arrows in 2026">

The core of **bizarre lineage how to summon stand** lies in the Stand Arrow. This consumable item is the only way to "roll" for a new Stand. Fortunately, the developers have provided multiple avenues for players to farm these essential items without spending Robux.

| Method | Efficiency | Notes |
| :--- | :--- | :--- |
| **Promo Codes** | **Excellent** | Best for beginners; check official Discord for 2026 codes. |
| **Repeatable Quests** | **High** | 1v1 matches give 2 arrows; Gang contracts give 3 arrows. |
| **Meteor Spawns** | **High** | Random world events; can drop 7-10 arrows per meteor. |
| **Bus Stop Spawns** | **Medium** | Arrows spawn randomly on the ground near bus stops. |
| **Raid Shop** | **Medium** | Purchase using Raid Tokens from Yoshikage Kira. |
| **Chests** | **Low** | Rare and Legendary chests have a small drop chance. |

<Callout type="info" title="Meteor Farming Tip">
Meteor spawns are the most efficient way to farm arrows in bulk. Watch the server announcements and rush to the impact site near major roads to secure a massive stack of 10 arrows in one go.
</Callout>

World events are another fantastic source. Participating in the **Morioh Station** event (near Bus Stop 8) or the **Graveyard Uprising** will reward you with chests that frequently contain Stand Arrows. For those who prefer structured gameplay, completing the main storyline and tutorial provides a steady stream of arrows to get your first few rolls started.

</Section>

<Section icon={Sparkles} title="Step-by-Step: Bizarre Lineage How to Summon Stand">

Once you have a Stand Arrow in your possession, the actual summoning process is straightforward. However, many players make the mistake of overwriting a rare Stand because they forgot to use the storage system. Follow these steps to ensure a safe and successful roll.

<Steps>
  <Step num="1" title="Secure your Current Stand">
    Open your **Stand Settings** and navigate to **Stand Storage**. If you have a Stand you want to keep, click **Store Stand**. If you use an arrow while a Stand is active and not stored, it will be deleted forever.
  </Step>
  <Step num="2" title="Access Inventory">
    Open your inventory (default key usually tied to the UI button) and locate the **Stand Arrow**.
  </Step>
  <Step num="3" title="Initiate the Roll">
    Click on the arrow and select 'Use'. Your character will perform a brief animation, and a random Stand will be assigned to you based on rarity percentages.
  </Step>
  <Step num="4" title="Manifest the Stand">
    Press **TAB** to summon your new Stand. Check the bottom of your screen to see the new moveset assigned to your [E], [R], [Z], [X], [C], and [V] keys.
  </Step>
  <Step num="5" title="Check Conjuration">
    Open your character menu to see the Stand's name and rarity. Begin defeating NPCs to increase your **Stand Conjuration** level, which unlocks additional passives.
  </Step>
</Steps>

<Callout type="warning" title="Permanent Loss Warning">
Using a Stand Arrow is a "reroll" mechanic. Unless you have used a **Stand Storage Slot** (earned via Prestige or Robux), the new Stand will completely replace your old one. Always double-check your storage before clicking 'Use'.
</Callout>

</Section>

<Section icon={Swords} title="Stand Rarity and Moveset Directory">

The excitement of **bizarre lineage how to summon stand** comes from the variety of the 17 available Stands. Each belongs to a rarity tier that dictates its spawn chance and general power level.

<CardGrid cols={3}>
  <Card title="Common & Uncommon">
    - **Red Hot Chili Pepper**
    - **Magician’s Red**
    - **The Hand**
    - **Purple Haze**
    - **Crazy Diamond**
  </Card>
  <Card title="Rare & Legendary">
    - **Killer Queen**
    - **Weather Report**
    - **Stone Free**
    - **Star Platinum**
    - **The World**
  </Card>
  <Card title="Mythical & Evolutions">
    - **Whitesnake**
    - **C Moon** (Evolve Whitesnake)
    - **Made in Heaven** (Evolve C Moon)
    - **The World High Voltage**
  </Card>
</CardGrid>

Below is a detailed breakdown of the movesets for the most popular Stands in the 2026 meta.

| Stand | Rarity | Key Moveset Abilities |
| :--- | :--- | :--- |
| **Whitesnake** | **Mythical** | Disc Throw [X], Acid Rupture [C], Disc Extraction [V] |
| **Star Platinum** | **Legendary** | Star Finger [R], Inhale [Z], Time Stop [C] |
| **The World** | **Legendary** | Knives [X], Timestop [C], Kick Volley [V] |
| **Killer Queen** | **Rare** | Primary Bomb [R+R], Sheer Heart Attack [Z], Stray Cat [X] |
| **Crazy Diamond** | **Uncommon** | Bearing Shot [Z], Heal Mode [X], Wall Smash [C] |
| **Anubis** | **Rare** | Rend [R], Dice Out [Z], Cursed Severance [X] |

<Callout type="success" title="Meta Recommendation">
If you manage to roll **Whitesnake**, stop rolling immediately. It is currently the most versatile Stand for both grinding and high-level PvP. Its evolution path into C Moon and Made in Heaven represents the pinnacle of power in Bizarre Lineage.
</Callout>

</Section>

<Section icon={Trophy} title="Stand Awakening and Progression Goals">

Summoning the Stand is only the start of your journey. To reach the "Endgame" of Bizarre Lineage, you must awaken your Stand's ultimate potential. This process is grueling and requires a significant time investment.

<Checklist
  id="awakening-requirements"
  title="Stand Awakening Checklist:"
  items={[
    "Reach Player Level 50 (Maximum)",
    "Reach Stand Conjuration Level 100",
    "Locate the Gym NPC near Bus Stop 2",
    "Defeat Jotaro, Avdol, and DIO in Raids",
    "Participate in 50 World Events"
  ]}
/>

Once these milestones are met, you unlock the **Stand Awakening (Ultimate)** skill, activated with the **H** key. This transformation significantly boosts your damage and often grants a cinematic finishing move.

To supplement your Stand, you should also look into Fighting Styles and Sub-Abilities. These provide utility and melee buffs that complement your Stand's powers.

| Type | Name | Obtainment Location |
| :--- | :--- | :--- |
| **Fighting Style** | **Boxing** | Gym Building (Bus Stop 2) |
| **Fighting Style** | **Karate** | Near Hospital (Bus Stop 15) |
| **Sub-Ability** | **Hamon** | Ancient Ghost (Bus Stop 13) |
| **Sub-Ability** | **Vampire** | Use Vampire Mask Item |
| **Sub-Ability** | **Cyborg** | Rudol von Stroheim (Bus Stop 3) |

<Callout type="tip" title="Synergy Tip">
Pairing **Star Platinum** with the **Boxing** fighting style is a popular 2026 strategy, as the physical buffs from Boxing stack well with the Stand's high Destructive Power.
</Callout>

</Section>

<Section icon={Shield} title="Frequently Asked Questions">

<FAQ items={[
  {
    question: "How do I get more Stand Storage slots?",
    answer: "You can unlock more slots by increasing your Prestige level at the Arch Mage NPC in the TC Hospital (Bus Stop 10). Alternatively, you can purchase them directly from the Robux shop for 398 Robux each."
  },
  {
    question: "Will I lose my Stand progress if I use a Stand Arrow?",
    answer: "Yes. Unless the Stand is stored in a storage slot, using a Stand Arrow will completely replace your current Stand and reset its Conjuration level. Always store before you roll!"
  },
  {
    question: "How do I get Stand skins in Bizarre Lineage?",
    answer: "Skins are obtained by using Lucky Arrows or Stand Skin Essences. Lucky Arrows are rare drops from Legendary Chests or can be purchased from the Raid Shop using tokens."
  },
  {
    question: "What is the fastest way to level up my Stand?",
    answer: "The fastest way is to complete repeatable quests and participate in World Events like the Morioh Station defense. These provide high experience for both your character and your Stand Conjuration."
  }
]} />

</Section>
